nasb.text: To Him who rides upon the highest heavens, which are from ancient times; Behold, He speaks forth with His voice, a mighty voice.

esv.text: to him who rides in the heavens, the ancient heavens; behold, he sends out his voice, his mighty voice.

cnv.text: 歌頌那乘駕在自古就有的眾天之上的主； 看哪！他發出了強而有力的聲音。

ccb.text: 歌颂凌驾在万古穹苍之上的主。 听啊，祂声如雷鸣。

csbs.text: 歌颂那乘驾于亘古的诸天之上的主！ 看哪，他发出声音，是强大的声音！
